/usr/bin/cc -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/triangle-vulkan.dir/triangle-vulkan.c.o" "CMakeFiles/triangle-vulkan.dir/__/deps/glad_vulkan.c.o" -o ../../../bin/triangle-vulkan  ../../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
